page1.title: Outcomes-Based Member Experience
page1.subtitle: AI + Human, One Vendor, One Price

current_state.containment_source: AI containment sourced from Fabletics Q&A response (Julie Barton, Dec 5, 2025): "Roughly 20–25% of inquiries are handled by self-service or chatbot tools."

voc_tool_footnote: Medallia confirmed as Fabletics VoC tool per Q&A response: "Feedback is collected via Medallia."

revenue_generation.source_note: Revenue generation (AI shopping assistant, cart abandonment, VIP conversion, intl expansion, lifecycle outreach, 24/7 sales capture) requires engagement beyond Global Member Services scope per Fabletics Q&A. Directional; subject to discovery validation.

use_cases.name: Billing Dispute Resolution
use_cases.definition: Dispute closed, no re-open within 48 hrs, no chargeback filed downstream.
use_cases.attribution: Zendesk ticket status · 48hr recontact rate · Payment-gateway chargeback flag · Post-resolution CSAT

use_cases.name: Skip / Cancel Flow
use_cases.definition: Member action completed, no re-contact on the same cycle, no inbound complaint filed.
use_cases.attribution: Billing-system action flag · Same-cycle recontact rate · Complaint-ticket tag · Deflection rate

use_cases.name: Retention Save
use_cases.definition: Member stays past the save window, next billing cycle completes without cancellation.
use_cases.attribution: Subscription status · Next-cycle completion flag · Save-offer acceptance · 30-day retention cohort

use_cases.name: Shipping / Delay Inquiry
use_cases.definition: Tracking provided or credit issued; no follow-up contact on the same shipment.
use_cases.attribution: OMS credit-issued flag · Tracking-link delivery · Shipment-ID recontact rate · Delivery confirmation

use_cases.name: VIP / Black Tier Concierge
use_cases.definition: Routed, resolved, and NPS captured within the same interaction thread.
use_cases.attribution: Routing SLA · Resolution confirmation · Medallia NPS capture · Tier-specific CSAT

priorities.name: Membership Billing Confusion
priorities.description: Proactive AI education at sign-up; skip-deadline reminders before the bill posts — direct fix for the #1 churn driver.

priorities.name: 3-Attempt Save Strategy
priorities.description: AI-assisted retention with savings history & earned perks surfaced in real-time; supervisor exceptions flow intact.

priorities.name: Ace / Maven / Newcomer Segmentation
priorities.description: Tone, offer, and channel personalized per segment — no scripting required.

priorities.name: Surge Capacity & Elasticity
priorities.description: First 10 days of cycle, Cyber Week, launches: AI scales instantly, no BPO staffing flex needed.

priorities.name: Black Tier Concierge
priorities.description: High-value segment: clear outcome signal, fast NPS feedback loop. Candidate for lighthouse pilot (pg. 3).

target_kpis: Increase MSAT YoY across all channels
target_kpis_footnote: Target KPIs sourced from Fabletics Q&A response, Section 5 (Vision and Goals for 2026).
path_forward: 30-min ROI walk-through with Tom, Julie, Dan
Discovery workshop to validate outcome definitions
Fabletics names IT POC (Genesys · CRM · Helpjuice)
Startek prepares SOW for 6–8 wk lighthouse pilot

pilot.name: Billing / Skip / Credit Automation
pilot.description: Rules-based, non-retention, non-escalation — the single lowest-risk, highest-ROI category in the entire Fabletics contact mix. Directly addresses the #1 pain point surfaced by Julie's team: "members not understanding skip deadlines" and "feeling tricked by VIP membership."
why_first: 35% of all contacts (~1.65M/yr) — single largest driver
Rules-based decision trees (skip Y/N, credit lookup, charge explanation) — no policy judgment
Knowledge base documented in Helpjuice (skip deadline, $59.95 charge, credits)
what_we_stand_up: AI voice + chat agent on Genesys — English & Spanish
Proactive skip-deadline reminder outbound — 48 hrs before the 5th
Warm transfer to Startek agents with full context — no re-explaining
Real-time containment, AHT, CSAT dashboard for ops
Zendesk / Helpjuice / Medallia integrations wired in
what_client_does: 15–23 hours total over 6–8 weeks — split across Julie, Dan, and one IT contact
No dedicated FTE, no new hires, no IT buildout — we plug into Genesys, CRM, Helpjuice, Zendesk
Anyreach + Startek absorb 95%+ of implementation effort
One named IT POC to unblock API / system access
commercial_offer: One vendor, one price — replaces Cognigy + a portion of current BPO
Priced per resolved member outcome — not per hour or per token
Resolution = query addressed with no repeat contact within 48 hrs
Ramp risk on us — containment misses hit our margin, not your invoice
Joint validation period defined in SOW before volumes scale
pilot.phase2_unlocks: Shipping / WISMO · Retention Save · Training needs analysis automation · 100% AI-assisted QA
